title: bupleurum ciliatum
intro: Bupleurum ciliatum, also known as Chinese thorowax or Chinese kudzing, is a plant species in the family Apiaceae. It has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antiviral effects, which have been attributed to the presence of sesquiterpenes and other bioactive compounds. The health benefits of Bupleurum ciliatum include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate joint pain and swelling, and improve liver function, making it a popular herbal remedy for various health conditions. Bupleurum ciliatum can be prepared into various herbal preparations, such as teas, tinctures, and decoctions, and is often used in combination with other herbs in traditional Chinese medicine formulas to enhance its therapeutic effects.
